required_preferences.fact: Begins weekly paired mentorship sessions in person with both junior developers, returning to interactive feedback and live code walkthroughs

supersedes.fact: Mentors her junior developer solely via asynchronous voice memos and annotated recordings during her recovery period — no live hands-on sessions

required_preferences.fact: Now has flexible, more frequent video calls and shared planning sessions with her sister, adjusting times as needed to coordinate support for the pregnancy and upcoming birth

supersedes.fact: Maintains a strict weekly video call with her sister, always at the same time regardless of schedule changes

persona: A mid-career backend developer at a fintech startup
